name: Example Specialty ICP
description: SAMPLE ICP profile. Copy this into ICP_PROFILES_PATH as {icp_id}.json, rename the icp_id, and replace the signals with the checklist for your client/specialty. This file is example data only and is not loaded automatically.

signals.prompt_instruction: Does this practice publicly list the target service line as a service they offer?
Does this appear to be an independent private practice (not hospital-owned, not part of a health system)?
Is this practice affiliated with, owned by, or part of a hospital or health system?
